mission.title: litellm: [Bug]: Cost tracking is not working with Vercel Models
mission.description: [Bug]: Cost tracking is not working with Vercel Models. This issue affects 32+ users.

steps.title: Identify litellm troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your litellm deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review litellm configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant litellm configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm
kubectl get configmap -n litellm -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=litellm
```
### Check for existing issues

### What happened?

I am using vercel through LiteLLM. All users are supposed to have a rate limit of 10$/month but the cost tracking is not working (c.f. example screenshot, 16M token for 0$).

steps.title: Apply the fix for [Bug]: Cost tracking is not working with Vercel Models
steps.description:
Investigating this. The pricing data exists for `vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5` in our model cost database:

```json
"vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5": {
    "input_cost_per_token": 5e-06,
    "output_cost_per_token": 2.5e-05,
    ...
}
```

The issue might be:
1. Usage
```yaml
"vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5": {
    "input_cost_per_token": 5e-06,
    "output_cost_per_token": 2.5e-05,
    ...
}
```

steps.title: Confirm [Bug]: Cost tracking is not working with Vercel… is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=litellm -n litellm --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n litellm --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary:
Investigating this. The pricing data exists for `vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5` in our model cost database:

```json
"vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5": {
    "input_cost_per_token: <REDACTED>,
    "output_cost_per_token: <REDACTED>,
    ...
}
```

The issue might be:
1. Usage data not being returned from Vercel AI Gateway
2.
codeSnippets:
- model_name: vercel/anthropic-claude-opus-4.5
  litellm_params:
    model: vercel_ai_gateway/anthropic/claude-opus-4.5
    api_key: <REDACTED>
  model_info:
    input_cost_per_token: <REDACTED>
    output_cost_per_token: <REDACTED>

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with litellm installed or the issue environment reproducible.
